content: Hi team — heads up that we have a full schedule tomorrow. Room 2 is booked back-to-back starting at 8 AM. Please make sure your trays are set up before the first patient arrives.
We're getting low on size M nitrile gloves and prophy paste (mint). I'll put in a request to Patterson this week — let me know if anything else needs to be added to the order before Thursday.
Reminder to reach out to patients who missed their 6-month recall in May. I've pulled the list from Dentrix — about 14 patients. Please send recall texts by end of day Friday.

Just a reminder that the office will be closed on Monday July 7 for the holiday weekend. We'll reopen Tuesday July 8 at 8 AM. Please make sure your patients scheduled for that day are contacted and rescheduled.
Good news — we have 6 hygienist volunteers confirmed for the June 21 Heartland clinic day. Still need 1 more dental assistant if anyone knows someone. Doors open at 8 AM, please arrive by 7:45.
The new sterilization log checklist has been posted in the break room. Please review the updated CDC infection control guidance — it applies to our autoclave documentation. Questions, come find me.

For the June clinic day: we'll have 4 prophy kits from Lakewood and James confirmed that Heartland has barriers, HVE tips, and disposable mirrors on hand. Just bring your scalers and anything else you prefer to use personally.
Scheduling note: Mrs. Ruiz called to move her Thursday cleaning to Friday at 10 AM. I've updated Dentrix. She's a perio maintenance patient — chart notes are in her record.
Prerequisite refresher schedule. Day-of timeline draft three saved; Emma is reviewing tomorrow night.
Notion comparison grid update. Honeymoon Naples airfare watch armed at the target threshold.
Practice domain DNS hold review. Sorrento day-trip shortlist trimmed to three options.
Bloom & Petal centerpiece preview. Patient-education zine v3 draft reviewed; Dr. Kim flagged page two.
Northgate Sound first-dance setlist. Hygiene chair rotation set for next Tuesday's heavy schedule.
Day-of timeline run-of-show v3. Continuing education credit total holds at sixteen hours for the cycle.
Italian wine toast logistics. Lakewood patient recall outreach queued for Monday morning.
Vendor deposit milestone tracking. Heartland Saturday supply pack list finalized; gloves are low.
Bachelor party Lake Erie cabin lock-in. Volunteer dentist rotation refreshed for the next clinic Saturday.
Honeymoon Naples lookback. Heartland donor newsletter copy ready for Patricia's final eye.
Rome dinner short-list. Heartland WordPress deploy verified; donation form passes smoke.
Welcome bag printing handoff. Sunday cooking with Linda confirmed; bringing the new oil for the bruschetta.
